use_cases: Toggling boolean settings on/off in configuration panels
Selecting single options from a group of choices in forms
Switching between view modes or display options in dashboards
Enabling or disabling features in toolbars and control panels
Filtering or sorting content with toggle-based controls
ai_summary: A reusable toggle button component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Supports multiple sizes (sm, md, lg) and variants (default, outline), with built-in hover, focus, and active state styling. Integrates seamlessly with form states and accessibility features for keyboard navigation.
